Hey!

I'm Sai Rishit, a developer based in India, focused on building polished full-stack products and AI-powered web experiences. My first project, Qurate, shows that direction in practice.

02 / Work

PROJECTS

My first project, Qurate, is an open source issue management engine that blends backend APIs, AI prioritization, and a responsive frontend experience.

01

Project 01

Qurate - Open Source Issue Management Engine

Built backend APIs for issue and task management using Node.js and Express.js, added AI-based issue prioritization and GitHub issue scoring, and developed responsive frontend components with React.js and MongoDB.

React.jsNode.jsExpress.jsMongoDBDocker
GitHubLive Demo
02

Project 02

Socials - Social Productivity Platform

Developed a full-stack productivity platform for goal tracking and community collaboration. Built REST APIs for authentication, task management, and user interactions; designed responsive React.js interfaces and managed data with MongoDB. Implemented secure authentication and user-matching features for accountability groups.

React.jsNode.jsExpress.jsMongoDB
GitHubLive Demo
